steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage explains that weeds spread easily and quickly become unmanageable. The blank verb must describe an action that becomes difficult precisely because of this rapid, uncontrollable spread.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content: Halting means stopping or preventing. The sentence is about the difficulty of halting an unstoppable spread—exactly the challenge the passage describes. Retrieving, saving, and pretending either describe irrelevant actions or create nonsensical meanings. That matches choice C — C is correct.
